title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation in polymer extrusion, benefiting local manufacturing and technology sectors.

summary: Police have apprehended a suspect in the stabbing of a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.

title: Grilling During the NC Burn Ban
